one_x_two.definition: Argmax of home/draw/away from the unified score matrix versus actual 90-minute result.

handicap_one_x_two.definition: Three-way handicap result using the frozen pre-match integer home handicap: sign(home_goals + home_handicap - away_goals).
handicap_one_x_two.hard_gate: No historical frozen handicap line means no handicap win-rate calculation. Lines may not be inferred from final scores or post-match pages.

exact_score.definition: Unified score-matrix Top-1 exact score versus actual 90-minute score.

total_goals.definition: Argmax of the total-goals marginal derived from the same unified score matrix versus actual 90-minute total goals.
